per_turn_leaks.student_message: When you have those episodes, do you notice anything else happening to your body?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Besides the breathing issues, I've been experiencing some discomfort on my right side that gets worse when I cough or take deep breaths.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Any sweating or clamminess when the symptoms hit?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I've been experiencing some intense sweating at night.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: So no perspiration at all during the episodes?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Actually, I've been experiencing night sweats every single night for the past four nights - it's quite uncomfortable.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Any stomach issues during the episodes? Nausea, queasiness, upset stomach?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: No stomach issues during the episodes. I've noticed my appetite has decreased a bit over the past few days and food hasn't been satisfying me as much.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Have you had any fevers, chills, or night sweats?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yes, I've been experiencing low-grade fever, usually around 100.8°F (38.2°C), which is intermittent and tends to get worse at night.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Have you noticed any changes in your appetite or weight?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I've noticed that my appetite has decreased a bit over the past few days. Food hasn't been satisfying me as much lately.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Any medical problems in your family? Parents, siblings?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: My mother has asthma, so that's something that's been a part of our family's history for a while now. And actually, my maternal grandmother passed away from lung cancer when I was younger.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Specifically, has anyone in your family had serious diseases?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response:
Has anyone in your family had serious diseases?"

Yes, my mother has asthma and my maternal grandmother died of lung cancer when I was a child. It's a bit concerning for me that I'm experiencing these breathing issues now.
